description: Unified education data standards graph — CEDS, SIF, Ed-Fi, PESC, CTDL, SEDM, JEDx, EdMatrix, CIP with cross-standard mappings, codeset comparison, and semantic search across all standards
_note: No startup needed. Docker --restart unless-stopped keeps containers running. First-time init: indexDataModelExplorer -start --assetsDir=./assets

definition.name: dme_search
definition.description: Semantic search across ALL education data standards (CEDS, SIF, Ed-Fi, PESC, CTDL, SEDM, JEDx, EdMatrix, CIP). Uses hybrid BM25 + vector search. Returns results ranked by relevance. Accepts optional --standard parameter to scope to a single standard.

query.description: Natural language search query — concept name, field description, or question about education data elements

standard.description: Optional: limit results to a specific standard (CEDS, SIF, EdFi, PESC, CTDL, SEDM, JEDx, EdMatrix, CIP)

definition.name: dme_graph_retriever
definition.description: Semantic search with graph context enrichment. Finds similar nodes by meaning, then traverses graph relationships to return surrounding context including cross-standard mappings, types, codesets, and reference networks. Use when you need to understand how a result connects to the rest of the data model.

query.description: Natural language description of what to search for

traversalMode.description: static: use pre-defined traversal (fast, free). dynamic: generate traversal Cypher specific to this query (slower, costs one LLM call, potentially richer).

searchMode.description: hybrid: BM25 + vector (default when both indexes exist). vector: vector similarity only. bm25: full-text only.

definition.name: dme_explore
definition.description: Show a specific node by name with all its properties and relationships. Returns the node's data plus all incoming and outgoing edges. Accepts optional --standard parameter to scope to a specific standard (CEDS, SIF, EdFi, PESC, CTDL, SEDM, JEDx, EdMatrix, CIP).

name.description: The exact name of the node to explore

standard.description: Optional: limit to a specific standard (CEDS, SIF, EdFi, PESC, CTDL, SEDM, JEDx, EdMatrix, CIP)

definition.name: dme_find_mappings
definition.description: Given a field from one standard, return its MAPS_TO counterparts in the other standard. Works bidirectionally: give a SIF field name/xpath to find CEDS mappings, or a CEDS property name/ID to find SIF mappings. Shows confidence score and whether the mapping is spec-annotated or embedding-inferred.

name.description: SIF field name, XPath, CEDS property name, or CEDS ID (e.g., 'BirthDate', '/StudentPersonals/StudentPersonal/Name/FirstName', 'P600559')

definition.name: dme_compare_codesets
definition.description: Compare allowed values (codesets) between SIF and CEDS for a concept. Shows alignment type (exact/subset/superset/partial), coverage percentage, and which values are unique to each standard. Useful for data mapping decisions.

name.description: Concept name to compare codesets for (e.g., 'grade', 'sex', 'state')

definition.name: dme_unmapped_fields
definition.description: List SIF fields that have no CEDS mapping — neither spec-annotated nor embedding-inferred. The annotation backlog. Shows object name, field name, xpath, and description.

definition.name: dme_stats
definition.description: Database statistics: node counts by standard and type, bridge edge counts (MAPS_TO, ALIGNS_WITH, STRUCTURALLY_MAPS_TO), and mapping coverage (annotated vs inferred vs unmapped).

definition.name: dme_raw_cypher
definition.description: Execute raw Cypher against the unified graph. All nodes are :ForgedNode with _source property indicating standard. Use MATCH (n:ForgedNode {_source: 'StandardName'}) to scope queries. Standards: CEDS, SIF, EdFi, PESC, CTDL, SEDM, JEDx, EdMatrix, CIP. Bridge edges: MAPS_TO, ALIGNS_WITH, STRUCTURALLY_MAPS_TO.

definition.name: dme_history
definition.description: Show graph build history — timestamped events for every load, embed, bridge, and export operation across all standards. Accepts optional --standard filter and --limit (default 20).

standard.description: Optional: show history for a specific standard only

limit.description: Maximum number of history events to return (default 20)

definition.name: usecase_graph_search
definition.description: Hybrid BM25 + vector search across UseCases data. Use cases from educoreproject/educore_use_cases GitHub issues, parsed into actors, steps, categories, and CEDS references. Returns ranked results by relevance.

definition.name: usecase_graph_explore
definition.description: Describe a UseCases node by name. Shows all properties and relationships.

name.description: Node name to explore in UseCases

definition.name: usecase_graph_stats
definition.description: Show UseCases graph statistics — node counts by type and edge counts by relationship type.

definition.name: usecase_graph_raw_cypher
definition.description: Execute raw Cypher against the unified graph. UseCases labels: :DataReference, :ExternalReference, :UseCase, :UseCaseActor, :UseCaseCategory, :UseCaseModel, :UseCaseStep (all :ForgedNode). Edge types: CATEGORIZED_AS, HAS_DATA_REFERENCE, HAS_REFERENCE, HAS_STEP, INVOLVES_ACTOR, PERFORMED_BY, REFERENCES_DATA.

definition.name: usecase_graph_history
definition.description: Show graph build history — timestamped events for every load, embed, bridge, and wipe operation.

definition.name: lif_graph_search
definition.description: Hybrid BM25 + vector search across LIF data. Learner Information Framework OpenAPI schema — entities, properties, cross-entity references, option sets, and option values describing learners, credentials, competencies, programs, and positions. Returns ranked results by relevance.

definition.name: lif_graph_explore
definition.description: Describe a LIF node by name. Shows all properties and relationships.

name.description: Node name to explore in LIF

definition.name: lif_graph_stats
definition.description: Show LIF graph statistics — node counts by type and edge counts by relationship type.

definition.name: lif_graph_raw_cypher
definition.description: Execute raw Cypher against the unified graph. LIF labels: :LifComposite, :LifEntity, :LifModel, :LifOptionSet, :LifOptionValue, :LifProperty, :LifRoot (all :ForgedNode). Edge types: HAS_COMPOSITE, HAS_ENTITY, HAS_OPTION_SET, HAS_PROPERTY, HAS_VALUE, MAPS_TO, REFERENCES, STRUCTURALLY_MAPS_TO.

definition.name: lif_graph_history
definition.description: Show graph build history — timestamped events for every load, embed, bridge, and wipe operation.

definition.name: clr_graph_search
definition.description: Hybrid BM25 + vector search across CLR data. IMS Global Comprehensive Learner Record Standard v2.0 — classes, properties, and cross-class references describing verifiable credentials, achievements, endorsements, and learner profiles in the W3C VC / 1EdTech ecosystem. Returns ranked results by relevance.

definition.name: clr_graph_explore
definition.description: Describe a CLR node by name. Shows all properties and relationships.

name.description: Node name to explore in CLR

definition.name: clr_graph_stats
definition.description: Show CLR graph statistics — node counts by type and edge counts by relationship type.

definition.name: clr_graph_raw_cypher
definition.description: Execute raw Cypher against the unified graph. CLR labels: :ClrClass, :ClrModel, :ClrOptionSet, :ClrOptionValue, :ClrProperty, :ClrRoot (all :ForgedNode). Edge types: HAS_CLASS, HAS_OPTION_SET, HAS_PROPERTY, HAS_VALUE, MAPS_TO, REFERENCES, STRUCTURALLY_MAPS_TO.

definition.name: clr_graph_history
definition.description: Show graph build history — timestamped events for every load, embed, bridge, and wipe operation.

definition.name: case_graph_search
definition.description: Hybrid BM25 + vector search across CASE data. IMS Global Competencies and Academic Standards Exchange Service v1.1 — classes, properties, and cross-class references describing competency frameworks, academic standards documents, items, associations, rubrics, subjects, and concepts in the 1EdTech / educational-standards ecosystem. Returns ranked results by relevance.

definition.name: case_graph_explore
definition.description: Describe a CASE node by name. Shows all properties and relationships.

name.description: Node name to explore in CASE

definition.name: case_graph_stats
definition.description: Show CASE graph statistics — node counts by type and edge counts by relationship type.

definition.name: case_graph_raw_cypher
definition.description: Execute raw Cypher against the unified graph. CASE labels: :CaseClass, :CaseModel, :CaseOptionSet, :CaseOptionValue, :CaseProperty, :CaseRoot (all :ForgedNode). Edge types: HAS_CLASS, HAS_OPTION_SET, HAS_PROPERTY, HAS_VALUE, MAPS_TO, REFERENCES, STRUCTURALLY_MAPS_TO.

definition.name: case_graph_history
definition.description: Show graph build history — timestamped events for every load, embed, bridge, and wipe operation.
